Unattended/batch browser runs execute on the USER's own machine (never a cloud browser) and deterministic replay uses ZERO model turns on the happy path. A batch of 200 rows (~$0.22) costs a tiny fraction of 200 interactive tasks (~$3.43). This is the structural margin lever.
